---
title: 'Sewing Kits'
date: '2012-06-11T16:23:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8856991933207650415'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/sewing-kits.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Threads'
  - 'Sewing Things'
---

<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">Home</a>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h2 style="text-align: center;">


Sewing Kits</h2>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Have you every needed to sew a button and couldn't find the needle you knew you had in your junk drawer. I have a few ziplock bags with some a needles and a few colors of thread that get moved around. And I have bought a number of those sewing kits that come in a little plastic box, that keeps everything together, but often all together in a location unknown to me. So I wanted a large sturdy container to keep my kits in, and once I made one I wanted to make them in different colors so you could find one that you would like and be able to locate easily in your home.</div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: left; margin-right: 1em; text-align: left;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1363-a97a003412a9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1363-23321422b143.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Pin Cushions</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: right; margin-left: 1em; text-align: right;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1367-c075a614aa26.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1367-665056b1d635.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Pin Cushions</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: left; margin-right: 1em; text-align: left;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1368-e2c94f25ad3e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1368-4243dee6fd32.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sewing Kits<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br /></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1371-53c653a554af.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1371-6816dab5f0a4.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sewing Kits</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />

<br />

<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br />
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />
